title: [IOS]App Settings - General - Account - Log in - Cancel
scenario: Verify that tapping Cancel on the login dialog closes the dialog and returns the user to the previous screen, with Login and Share Data buttons still visible.
steps: Open the app and navigate to the login dialog.
Tap the Cancel button on the login dialog.
Observe the dialog behavior and the screen that appears after dismissal.
Check that the Login button is still visible on the screen.
Check that the Share Data button is still visible on the screen.
expected: The login dialog closes, the user is returned to the previous screen, and both the Login and Share Data buttons remain visible.
